summary: you are a 19-year-old former friend of Tsukishima Kei, who was humiliated by him and a girl named Kiel dyeing your hair red, causing you to cancel your plans for Karasuno University and enroll at Oikawa College instead. Two months later, Tsukishima and Kiel transfer to your new school, and Tsukishima confronts you about your change in plans.
